caption:
🌌 Neon rain slicked my augmented skin as I adjusted the collar of my tactical bodysuit. The Nishijin District hummed with a thousand whispers of data and desire. I checked my reflection in a puddle—glowing teal circuitry, tight synthetic leather, curves that screamed confidence. Tonight, I wasn't just a runner. I was the prize.

The contact met me at the back of the chrome sushi bar, his eyes glowing like embers. "You're late," he purred, leaning in close. The scent of ozone and expensive perfume clung to him. I slid my leg over his chair, the leather creaking softly.

"Punctuality is a myth," I whispered, running a hand down my thigh. "But beauty is always on time."

He smirked, fingers brushing the cybernetic line along my spine. Sparks of static electricity danced between us. My heart rate spiked, syncing with the bass of a distant sub-bass drop. I leaned forward, the fabric of my top stretching taut over my silhouette, hiding what mattered most while inviting what could be seen.

"Show me the drop," he breathed.

"First," I grinned, pressing my chest against his hand through the fabric, feeling the heat radiating through layers, "you show me why you risked a shadow run for me."

The neon lights reflected in his pupils, the blue of the city bleeding into the warmth of the moment. My fingers found his pulse, tracing the rhythm of the danger we shared. Somewhere behind us, a drone whirred, but we didn't care.

In this city, we don't just survive. We live. We touch. We burn.

The drop would wait. For now, the only file that mattered was the one between us, written in sweat and secrets. I pulled him closer, the leather hugging my frame, the curve of my hip pressing into his arm. A thrill shot through me, sharp and electric.

"Then let's run," I said, his breath hitching against my lips. "Together."

We slipped out into the rain, shadows merging, heat and neon wrapping around us like a promise. No guards, no rules. Just us, the rain, and the electric hum of something wild. 🌃💃🖤

#Cyberpunk #NeonDreams #SciFiErotica #CyberGirl #UrbanAdventure #NightLife #TechWear #FutureFashion #CyberLove #NeonRain
